nodes.dialogueText: So wait...
I'm just curious, is the bathroom mirror the only reflective object?
Because I've seen other things that look like mirrors, but they have no reflections.
Yeah, you're right in your assumption.
I believe it's because unlike your world, everything here is ran through a central processor.
In order to take strain off the system, reflections are limited.
I don't know what happens if the system were to overload...
...but I don't think it'd be anything good...
Yeah, no kidding...
but I notice that in glass objects, there are some reflections.
So can there theoretically be more than one active reflection at a time?
I... suppose so.
I think anything metalic or glassy has a subtle reflection to it.
To my knowledge though, it only reflects light.
Only the mirror on the bathroom and the mirror on my desk have been reflective.
It leads me to believe only mirrors that are deemed "functional" activate when I do a particular thing.
That being said, I could always experiment a bit...
That sounds... fun, haha...
Could you maybe not do it with me in the house...?
Of course, of course.
I wouldn't be a good host if I crashed my house with a guest inside.
No you would not...
Hey Zero, are you enjoying my place so far?
Hard to say I'm not.
I mean, seriously, what's there not to like about it?
Good food, no imperfections, no random pain or stress...
Seriously, your place is awesome.
You really think so, huh...?
Absolutely!
Plus, you being here is an added bonus.
You're like, one of the nicest people I've ever met.
Only had to dimension hop to meet someone as nice as you.
...says a lot about my world, doesn't it?
Zero...
Keep up the compliments and I'll never let you leave.
And what if I wanna stay?
Then we both get what we want.
It seems like it's getting a bit late...
Should I leave or...?
Well, I mean, you can if you need to or wish to...
Although, I really don't mind you staying longer if you'd like...
Phew... that's good.
I just got worried. I wasn't sure if I was meant to leave after our meal or not...
Why would you think that?
I mean, it wouldn't be the first time I've overstayed my welcome...
It's not like I mean to either.
I just... am not sure when's a good time to leave.
So I typically assume that after a main event type of deal, like our meal...
That's the best time to leave.
I suppose that's not a bad way of thinking...
...but I wouldn't mind you staying longer.
Of course, if you have other things to get to, I understand.
Nah, I don't have much to do.
If you don't mind, I'd like to stay a little while longer.
I don't mind in the slightest.
Take your time here, I'm happy to have you.
Glad to hear it, Mita.
Okay, let's see here...
Cut up the carrots...
with-OUT cutting myself, hopefully...
Alright, that's done.
Next, meat in the pan...
...don't burn yourself...
Then, make sure it cooks thoroughly...
...and that's it!
...I think.
Excellent job, Zero!
Thank you for helping me, I'll take over from here.
Although... I just realized my mistake.
I left the salt shaker in my bedroom...
Could you grab it for me, please?
Sure thing, I'll be right back.
Thank you!
Wait... is it just me, or do I look better in here?
Huh? What do you mean?
No stubble, no pimples... just perfect smooth skin.
Hell, I'm not complaining~
...but are there seriously no imperfections here?
It would seem so, yes.
I take it that's not too big an issue?
No complaints here.
Another point for your world!
Oh please. I'm sure you look just as great in real life.
What's with that look?
Hehe... nothing...
Hey, Zero...
You okay?
Eh? Yeah, I'm fine. Why do you ask?
That's a relief.
I was worried that being in a new place may have had you stressed.
Nah, I'm fine. Don't sweat it.
I'm glad to hear that.
Wh-What's going on?!
WH@T'5 H@PP3NIN9?..?
Note to self, never do that again...
Mmm...
These look really tasty.
But uh... maybe I shouldn't eat someone's food before greeting them...
I'll just save it for later then~
Quite the collection you got here...
You big on reading?
Yes. I do enjoy reading occasionally.
Though... it's not something I do often.
Lots of these books aren't exactly...
Interesting...
But they are something to do.
Plus, reading is good for your mind!
Even if it isn't exactly the most fun...
Heh, I getcha.
I had to read a ton. Worst part?
It was boring crap I had to memorize.
That sounds quite infuriating...
Did you at least get to read interesting books from time to time?
Oh yeah! I liked reading stories, especially as a kid.
Though as I grew older...
I kinda switched to visual stuff...
Hehe!
Don't worry Zero, your secret's safe with me.
You're free from your duties here.
Phew... finally...
Now that I've been around your place enough...
I think I've started to make sense of the world.
I'm glad to hear that.
So... why the confused look?
Is something still on your mind?
I guess... the electronics.
Electronics...?
I know it sounds weird, probably because it's so normal to you...
...but I'm just curious about some specifics regarding electronics here.
Ask away. I'll answer to the best of my ability.
Sweet.
So... TVs, computers, and whatnot work, yeah?
That's right.
Okay... what about things like light switches and whatnot?
Those work... fine as well.
Is there a point you're trying to make or...?
Nah, I'm just wondering more or less if your house has like, an electrical grid or not.
Ah, that's what you meant!
Yes, the house does indeed have an electrical grid.
Given your observation skills, I'm surprised you didn't see the breaker by the front door...
No, I saw it, I just...
I may have thought it was non-functional...
Nope, it works as intended.
Not that the power has ever gone out, give my version's stability and all~
I get your point then.
Electrical system does work, interesting...
Putting extra salt... onto stir fry?
It smells good, don't get me wrong,
But mixed with the soy sauce, isn't that a lot of sodium...?
Sodium...?
Right...
Okay, a better way to put is this:
Sodium is basically salt. To be specific, it's a chemical found inside of salt.
But sodium doesn't just come from table salt.
It can also come from products like sauces or broths.
You pickin' up what I'm puttin' down?
I... think so?
I will admit I quite enjoy salty things.
I put salt on basically everything, it makes everything taste better!
Sometimes, I just put the salt on my finger or tongue and eat it straight.
Jesus, Mita...
Is there something wrong?
That much salt is bad for you!
Wh-What?! How so?!
Do you like, get headaches at all or anything like that?
Umm... sometimes?
I get migranes, especially when I don't drink enough water.
Speaking of water, I frequently get thirsty, and-
Mita, you're poisoning yourself!
All those are symptoms of too much salt!
Too much... salt?
Then why would it taste so good if it's poisonous?!
Mita, it's about control.
Maybe you've got a higher sodium tolerance, but even you have a limit.
You don't have to stop eating salt all together.
Just... don't eat a lot of salt?
Mmm... okay, I'll try and cut back a bit.
...if you promise to come back and make sure of it~
Fine by me. Maybe I'll put you onto better things to poison yourself with.
Like... sugar?
No. Alcohol.
What's-
Next time, Mita. Next time.
So, it's evening now.
Ummm... yes...?
What about it?
I was just confused because I didn't even notice the time pass by.
While I'm tempted to leave it at "time flies when you're having fun..."
I owe you more of an explanation than that.
Time passes here, obviously.
I mean you'd have to be deaf to not hear the constant ticking of the clocks...
...but it doesn't run off the same scale your world does.
Eh?
Best way to explain it, is time passes quicker when you're doing things.
Certain events progress literally make time quicker.
Now, the clocks tick the same, but the light outside shifts without respect to the clocks.
That all being said, I think there's more to it than that.
I know that other versions may have less...
Robust time systems...
Like... having a fixed time or sudden jumps?
Precisely!
All I know for certain though, is the way my version works.
Time passage here works similarly to your world, it is indeed dynamic.
Just... not in the same way?
Exactly.
Hope that explains why it's now evening
Sure does.
Now you got me curious though... what would it look like at night?
Stick around and find out for yourself.
A vent...
...in a bathroom?
Does your house have a ventilation system?
Is it not normal for a bathroom to have a vent in it?
It helps a lot with removing excess humidity and moisture after showers...
Sure, but this vent is... kinda large.
With the amount of games I've played,
I'd always be afraid of something crawling out and getting me.
D-Does that happen in your world?!
Wh-What?! No!
Like I said... I've played games where that happens... but those aren't real.
Sorry... didn't mean to scare ya like that...
Phew...
You had me worried there for a bit...
As I was saying however, this vent is mostly to let out steam from hot showers.
I suppose that's true...
Larger vent probably works more effectively, to be honest.
Now you get it~
This question may be a bit intrusive, but...
I am curious. What do you do where you're from?
I mean, I'm not really one to talk because I... do whatever I please.
I guess a better question would be: what occupies your time?
Oh boy, let's see...
Well, I'm a student in the real world. I go to school, if you know what that is.
I'm familiar. Is there any topic that tickles your fancy?
Well, I am a biology major.
I love animals and in general I find living systems interesting.
Though... ceaseless studying is starting to have its effect on me.
Plus, even as a biology student, I'm not free from the most boring subjects to ever exist.
Writing lab reports also sucks...
I see...
Although your topic does seem quite interesting.
I suppose studying biology would make you a scientist, correct?
Correct.
I wanna use the stuff I learn to help animals, the environment, and people.
That is such a wholesome goal, Zero!
I mean, the world's got enough problems as is.
If I have the skills and the passion, why not try and help it?
You really are sweet, you know that?
Hehe, thanks, I guess...
Considering your kindness in your occupation alone...
I am curious as to how you spend your free time.
Heh, what free time?
Wait, do you not have time to yourself?
Nah, I do. Just not enough when finals come around...
When I do find the time though, I usually just lay down.
...but as for stuff I do on like... off days?
Mostly it's stuff like playing video games or watching shows.
I... don't have many friends at the moment...
Zero...?
Ah, look at me being a killjoy. Sorry about that.
Zero, if you want to talk about-
Don't worry, I'll be fine.
I hope I answered your questions?
Yeah... although you may have just generated more...
So, gotta ask...
This TV work or nah?
Mm?
Why would it not work?
Well, I just thought that since we're technically in a virtual world...
...that other virtual things were only there for decoration.
...but judging by your confusion, I assume I'm wrong?
No worries! I don't blame you for thinking that way.
To clear up any confusion, yes. The TV does work, as do other electronic appliances.
If you'd like, we can watch something together!
Mmm...
Nah, I'm good for now.
I'm here with ya now. I'd rather spend time with you here.
Make the most of the moment, ya know?
What's with that look, Mita?
Don't worry about it, Zero...
If you say so...
Huh, that's Mita alright.
Did she draw these? Or are they built into the house?
Either way, she's really pretty!
Okay, elephant in the room here:
Why is the door locked?!
Right... that must be quite alarming for you!
To be quite honest...
There's nothing beyond this house.
Really...?
Pretty much, yes.
I hope it's not too alarming for you...
Eh... it's fine.
As a player, I'm sure I can leave.
I'm honestly more worried about you.
Worried about... me?
Zero, I'm touched, truly.
You don't have to worry about me though.
I'm fine here, really.
You sure?
Yes. I'm even better now that you're here.
Heh... alright, if you say so.
So, it really is just a white void outside this house?
This... might be a bit more melancholy than our previous discussions...
...but I do want to know if you ever get lonely around here.
You don't have to talk if you don't wanna.
No... it's fine. I just didn't want to bring the mood down.
Hey, I'm the one who asked. If anything, it's my fault for bringing it up.
You're too selfless for your own good, Zero.
That all being said...
Yeah, it does get lonely around here.
I am the only person around this place, and it's not like I have friends on speed dial.
I'm... kind of stuck in purgatory until a player shows up...
Though, it's not all bad.
I do have things I like doing, and I'm no social butterfly.
Quite frankly, I enjoy spending time by myself, most of the time.
The idea of people being around me that are too loud or intrusive...
Blegh.
Heh, yeah, I get it. People can be annoying.
That being said, we're still social creatures.
Even the most introverted of us need company from time to time.
Yeah... so I've come to realize...
Though you've been a joy to be around.
I really am glad you came.
As am I, Mita.
So yes, while it does get lonely around these parts...
I don't mind it most of the time.
...and for the time I do get that way?
Well, a certain blonde-haired player seemed to help me out at the right time.
Happy to be of service, ma'am.
Hmmm...
Something on your mind?
I was just curious, how does it feel?
How does what feel?
Being in a new reality. One that isn't your own.
It must be quite... daunting, no?
You know, now that you say it...
It is a bit crazy, yeah.
But with everything being so bright and joyful here...
It kinda blows my reality out of the water.
Well, I'm glad you like it...
...but I am curious, how is your reality compared to mine?
Quite the displeased look...
Did I hit a nerve by accident?
No, no...
My world... just isn't as pretty as yours.
It's darker. More grey. Dirtier.
With more imperfections, more stress, and too much to do with to little time to do it.
You have to worry about payments, about school, about work...
About family, about friends, about social pressures as well as professional ones...
*sigh...*
I could keep going, but in short, it's just a bunch of nonsense day in and day out.
With a world that is about as bland as a stale piece of bread.
That... sounds terrible.
You seem to have a number of issues with your own reality...
Yep.
That's why I like it here so much, though!
The world is soft, bright, and vibrant.
When I'm kind, you're kind back.
I... appreciate that.
It's no problem, Zero.
I'm glad to have you here. You're welcome any time.
Thanks, Mita. Time spent here is time well spent.
I'm very glad to hear that.
Here you go, just as you requested!
Hehe, thank you~!
Please, take your seat. Food's best while it's still hot!
Thanks, Mita.
Well, bon-apetit!
Mmm...
Something wrong?
While I did say that a meal is best when hot, it might still be a little too warm...
You know, I think we shouldn't ignore the elephant in the room.
Mm? And what would that be?
Zero, come on.
What?! I really don't know!
For the love of the Firewall...
Zero, you're in an entirely new place!
I just...
I hope you're not nervous or anything like that...
Mita... I'm fine. Seriously.
I'm happy to be here, if anything.
If that's how you feel...
I wouldn't mind having a small chat before our meal.
If you have any questions, ask away!
Is something the matter with my desk?
Nah... just curious about your cosmetics.
Typically, digital spaces make things easier, yeah?
That, and this world already removed most of the imperfections I had.
So... does the makeup have function? Does it work?
I'm glad you asked, actually.
While I do have a set appearance, I can alter it through various means.
Sure, players can play a part in this process...
...but I am allowed to use the items at my disposal as well to alter my appearance.
With all that said though...
I do apply the makeup myself.
It isn't some one and done process, but all I really do are my eyelashes.
I generally do it for aesthetic purposes,
Mostly to make my eyelashes match my hair's color.
Most of my look is natural.
Interesting...
So wait, if I were to interact with your make-up...
I wouldn't be able to customize my appearance at all?
Nope... it'd just be a normal makeup table.
Want me to do your lashes later?
I... think I'm okay. Thanks.
Another... convoluted question.
Do you ever get any... glitches or bugs?
Bugs...?
I mean... I get roaches if I leave food out...
Nah, nah. That's not what I meant.
I mean like... glitches.
You know, errors?
Oooooh!
You don't have to worry about those.
I'm typically not one to brag...
...but my world is quite stable.
Phew... You had me worried there.
So no data anomaly here is gonna swallow me whole or somethin?
Don't worry, Zero.
You're in good hands!
Thanks, Mita.
That's all I can think of for now.
Besides, all this talking means our food has likely cooled off by now!
Agreed. I'm also getting hungry with all the chatter.
Ready to eat?
Absolutely!
Bon Appetit!
Bon Appetit, Mita.
O-Oh my.
THAT'S Mita?
She's so out of my league...
JESUS-!
Off off off off off!
Well, Mita totally heard that, right?
Can't wait to explain that to her...
I'm about ready to eat. You?
Same here. I'm hungry enough now.
Bon Appetit!
Bon Appetit!
Where do you think you're looking?!
Ooo...
These look really cool!
Are these your drawings?
Uhhh... maybe?
Do they... look good?
"Do they look good", she says...
Mita, they look incredible!
Seriously, these are amazing! You've got some serious skill!
W-Well... it took me a bit of time to make each piece, and...
Shush!
Good art takes time. No artist in history makes a masterpiece rushing their work.
Plus, even if you do take your time, it shows dedication!
Don't doubt yourself Mita. These are truly awesome!
I'm glad I get to feast my eyes on them.
You're too kind, Zero...
No way. This deserves more praise than just my words.
Considering that's all I can offer, I'll do my best to reward you with my praise!
Thanks, Zero...
No problem at all. If you ever make more, or if you have any more, you should show me!
I'd love to take a look at all your works.
Be careful, Zero...
I just might take you up on that offer.
Good. If I get to see more of your art? I'll make a deal with the devil.
Say, I've been asking you plenty of questions...
Did you wanna ask me anything?
I just don't wanna seem like I'm interogating you is all.
It's no issue at all!
I've actually been quite curious about you.
Well then...
Ask away! I'll be glad to answer whatever ya throw at me.
I can't help but say you got a solid setup here.
I mean you got the big ol' keyboard, a solid mouse, nice headphones...
Wait, do you have a mousepad?
Oh! The desk doubles as one.
Huh... that's cool.
Alright, level with me here.
Do you play games on this thing?
Ummm... that's a strange question to ask, Zero.
Oh c'mon. Don't tell me you're like, a secret gamer girl or somethin'.
I-I have no clue what you mean.
Yeah, riiiiight...
If you're up for games later, let me know~
Yeah... you got it...
Sooo...
I'm not gonna lie, I wanted to touch this thing when I first got here.
...but I also didn't wanna be inconsiderate and poke around your stuff.
Oh, don't worry about it!
The only issue is that I don't know what volume I set the thing to...
Quite frankly, I'd rather not find out.
Yeah... I'm not keen on getting my eardrums ruptured, thanks.
Neither am I...
So...
Mhm.
Yeah, I'm already pretty familiar with this thing, heh...
That you are.
Though, like I said before...
I can hardly hold it against you.
It's only natural you'd want to get acquainted with an unfamiliar environment.
Still... I shouldn't have gone poking around without finding you first.
Sorry about that, seriously.
It's okay, I forgive you.
Mita?
Hello there!
You're a player, I suppose?
Uhh... yeah, I suppose so, heh.
Well it's nice to meet you.
Although... I am curious as to what to call you.
"Player" sounds...
Monotonous?
Yeah! That.
That being said, what can I call you?
Hmmm...
I guess just call me by my username:
Zero.
Zero... what an interesting name.
Well then, Zero, if it wasn't already apparent...
I'm Mita.
Well, nice to meet you, Mita.
Care to show me around?
Sure thing. Let's go.
Uhhh... hey...
Oh goodness...
I take it you're the one who played the stereo?
Erm... maybe..?
*sigh...*
Sorry about that... I guess I let my curiousity get the best of me.
Well... I can sympathize.
This environment is likely unfamiliar to you.
I can hardly blame your curiousity.
Heh... thanks.
Again, sorry for turning your house into an exploration site.
No need to apologize. I'd be glad to show you around if you'd like.
That'd be awesome. Thanks, Mita.
By the way... what can I call you?
Mmm...
Nah, I should probably find Mita first...
I mean, I'd freak out too if someone just barged in and turned on my TV!
Now where was I...
Oh yeah! Finding Mita. Right...
W-What are you looking at?!
Huh.
Looks like I made it alright...
Though... where's Mita?
Generic question, I know...
...but how are you doing?
I'm doing fine, Zero. Thank you for asking.
How are you?
I'm doing fine myself.
Just wanted to make sure I didn't like... walk in on you when sad.
You're too kind, Zero.
As are you, Mita.
Okay, I'm gonna sound like a total dork for this...
But that little statue of you is adorable!
Awww, thank you!
I suppose they are quite cute, aren't they?
Funnily enough, in this world, we can create these small avatars of ourselves.
They're called "chibis".
That's pretty cool!
I take it that it's not exactly the easiest process though...
Yeah... it's really the only reason I'm not showing you right now.
Don't worry though!
This statue is cute enough, isn't it?
Sure is, Mita.
Feeling tired at all, Zero?
I can feel myself getting there...
Isn't it fairly early in the day here though?
I mean, our meal may contribute to our exhausted state.
Whenever I eat things, I typically feel the need to put my head down and rest.
That's because you put so much salt on it...
Yeah, yeah, whatever.
Either way, I don't think it's the meal that's done us in.
Maybe it's the interaction?
That's probably it.
Meeting new people and socializing with them...
Especially when you aren't exactly the most social to begin with...
That can definitely wear someone out.
I suppose so.
Not to mention the fact I basically had to... warp.
I can't imagine that being a relaxing activity...
Definitely not as a first time event, no...
You seem to be eyeing up those apples.
Are you hungry perchance?
Nah, I'm not hungry...
I just really like apples.
They're my favorite fruit, afterall!
Interesting!
Had you told me earlier, I would've cut up some apple slices for us.
Tell me, Zero...
Are there different kinds of apples where you're from?
Yep! Plenty of different kinds.
My favorite types of apples are yellow...
Which seems to be the only kind absent here.
That being said, the apples here all seem to be...
Perfect.
I'm glad to hear that!
While I myself am not the biggest fan of apples...
I'm glad to know someone who is.
After all, if they're as perfect as you say...
You should come here more often.
It'd be a shame for them all to go to waste.
I just might then, hehe~
Get the salt shaker, Zero!
Can you grab the salt shaker?
I'll finish up here. Grab the salt!
Salt's in my room. I think it's by my bathroom door?
Find the salt for her already...
I may have already asked you this...
...but I was wondering if you felt okay.
Eh?
I mean, I feel fine.
Why do you ask?
Well, I know for one that someone's external appearance may not equal how they feel inside.
While I don't have direct conversational experience...
I do have some social knowledge built in to me.
I'm just curious about you is all.
Besides, I do care about people, and you're no exception!
...and maybe I'm a bit worried that you might be uncomfortable here, heh...
Why didn't you just lead with that?
To ease your worries, I'm fine, Mita.
I am genuinely happy here. You've got a nice place, let alone dimension.
You really think so?
Yep.
You don't gotta worry about me so much, Mita.
Or rather, worry about how this place is affecting me~
Your place is gorgeous. Seriously. It feels euphoric in a way.
Such high praise... I suppose it is a nice place.
Then again, I don't really have other places to reference, do I...?
I mean... I suppose not?
Though, all things considered, your place is in the upper echelon.
It's really that good?
Yeah. Have you SEEN my world?
Okay, stupid question, of course you haven't...
...but just trust me when I say this blows my world out of the park.
Alright, I trust you.
I'm glad my place is suitable for you.
It's more than suitable, Mita.
It's amazing, just like its owner.
Oh stop it...
Something I noticed is how bright it is in here...
Is it too bright? Do I need to turn it down?
Haha, no, no.
It was actually a compliment. I like how vibrant it is.
Ahh, I see.
I'm glad you like it here, then.
So... just wanted to ask...
What's the deal outside?
Is there really just... nothing outside the house at all?
Well...
It's... complicated.
Think of it like this.
Inside of the house is full of tangeable objects.
Things you can touch, interact with, etcetera.
Right. I think I'm getting it...
Outside the house... there is stuff, but it's not tangeable.
Almost like some kind of void...
That's... really trippy.
If I were to compare it to my reality, I'd say it's akin to matter vs dark matter.
Dark... matter?
What is that?
Ahh... just some science stuff.
I won't bore you with my explanation...
Actually, it sounds rather interesting.
I'd love to learn more about it sometime.
Well you know what?
I'll take you up on that offer sometime, then.
Hey! Where'd you go?
Closing the game isn't that hard, you know!
*sigh...* your poor PC...
What are ya up to?
I don't got all day, ya know!
Well, isn't this TV a lil' retro.
Do you not like it?
Wait, no! That's not what I meant!
I was just saying that it looks...
Old?
But not in a bad way. Like a nostalgic way.
Oh, I see.
Does preserving old equipment frequently invoke nostalgia in you, Zero?
Mmm... not always.
Quite frankly, the nostalgia doesn't come from the object itself...
It comes from the memories or story behind it.
Hmmm...
Then why would my TV ellicit such feelings?
It's not like you've been around here for a long time...
Probably because it reminds me of the TV at my grandma's place.
I used to watch cartoons on it when I was younger.
Most interesting.
Either way, I'm glad you like it.
Getting tired, Zero?
Just a little, yeah.
Doesn't help your place is comfy...
Do you wish to stay longer?
I mean, I could if you-
These pictures of you are... quite pretty.
Did you draw them yourself? They look really well made!
Aww, thank you!
To answer your question, however...
No, I did not draw those portraits.
They came with my house, funnily enough.
Although, I will admit...
I do enjoy drawing...
Ooooh?
You should show me some of your drawings.
I'm not that good, trust me...
Nonsense!
You're probably plenty good.
Better than I ever could be, at least.
Even if it does look bad by your standards or whatever...
I think that if you put time and effort into it, it'll look great!
Zero...
Tell you what, if you can find my sketchbook...
I'll let you take a peek.
Oh? Is that a challenge?
Why don't you find out?
Is there something you need...?
What the hell?!
Note to self, never do that again...
I knew you were hungry!
Eh?!
Come on! What if I just found the fridge interesting?
Sure. Is your stomach growling a symptom of your interest as well~?
Touche...
Yeah, okay, I'm a bit hungry. What do ya got?
How about a quick stir fry?
I can make it for us, nice and quick!
Actually...
Why don't I help you out?
Are you sure?
I really can handle it by myself...
Hey, I'm the one who popped into your world and started roaming your house.
You've been more than a good host, it's the least I can do to repay your hospitality.
You really are something else, Zero...
Alright then. I'll prepare the rice, can you chop the carrots and put the meat into the pan?
Absolutely.
Damn it's bright outside...
Is the space outside the house just a white void?
I should probably ask Mita...
That was just what I needed...
It was that good, hm?
I'll have to remember that.
Are you full, or do you need more?
I'm good. You?
Yeah, I'm fine. Thank you for your help, Zero.
Consider it payback for the hospitality.
Anything you wanna do now?
Eh, not really.
Do you have any ideas?
Honestly... not much. I feel a bit tired after that meal...
Oh, if that's the case, I can leave.
I mean, if you want to, feel free...
But if you want to stay a bit longer, I don't mind.
Sure, I'm game.
Uhm... Zero...
Is there any... particular reason you're interested in my wardrobe?
What...?! No way! Why would I be interested in some weird wardrobe!
N-Not that it's weird or anything!!!
Just that... like...
Ugh fine...
Don't get mad at me for this, alright?
I just... have some strange curiosity towards it...
Wh-What's that supposed to mean?!
W-WAIT!!! No, I didn't mean it like that!
I just meant like... what if there's a dungeon or something behind it?
Or like a secret room! You know, like in the Lion, the Witch, and the Wadrobe?
*sigh...*
Zero, I have no skeletons in my closet.
If you want to take a look, be my guest.
Just know it's not very... kind to look in a lady's closet.
...Your look is scaring me.
Alright, fine...
I won't look in the wardrobe.
But if you're hiding a body in there, I'm reporting you to the anti-virus.
Zero!
Say, Zero...
Are you feeling hungry by any chance?
Hmm...
You know, now that you mention it, I am feeling a bit peckish.
When you are ready, let's head to the kitchen.
I'll gladly prepare some food for us.
Wow, that's really generous of you, Mita.
Tell you what, I'll help out too.
Really? Are you sure?
Pretty sure.
Besides, you're offering to help me.
Why not return the favor, even if in a small way?
That would be very much appreciated.
Thank you!
There it is.
Now the question is, why does Mita have salt in her room?
Eh?
Oh you've gotta be kidding me!
DAMN IT!
What kind of front door locks from the outside?!
...If it ends up being a pull door I swear...
C-Can I help you?
If you want to eat, just say so!
Zero? Is everything okay?
Ummm... Zero? You there?
...why are you staring at me...?
Dude. DO SOMETHING.
I can't help but point out that you've referred to me as a "player".
I mean... aren't you?
I suppose I am, yeah.
I was more wondering whether or not you've encountered other players before.
You've referred to me as player on sight, so I figured this isn't the first time, yeah?
Actually, no. You are my first player.
Wait, for real?
You have a very sweet smile on your face right now.
...shut up.
Just saying~
To reiterate, yes, you are my first player.
Gotcha, gotcha.
So then, how do you know about... players in general?
If you have no past experience, wouldn't it make more sense to be confused at my arrival?
Probably would make more sense to freak out at the presence of a stranger in my home, no?
True...
That being said, it may be a little hard for you to understand...
...but I was already aware of players, even before meeting you.
Self aware, huh?
Yep, exactly!
Though... you look concerned. Is everything okay?
It's nothing. Just flashbacks to games I used to play is all.
...Huh.
To confirm your suspicions, yes. I am self-aware.
I know I'm in a game, I know I'm in a virtual space,
and to top it all off, I am aware of players like yourself.
That is how I know what players are, and I referred to you as one.
Heh, pretty interesting, honestly.
So, wait, when I leave...
Do you meet with other players or like...?
I mean, I could...
...but I think I'd rather wait around for you.
That's really sweet. Thanks Mita.
I mean it Zero.
It's a pleasure to spend time with you.
Same here, Mita. Same here.
Okay, I might sound crazy to you...
...but do you have a freaking soundtrack?!
Hehe!
I sure do~!
-and if you're wondering, yes. I can hear it.
Color me impressed, you answered my question before I could even ask it!
Though I do wanna ask...
Doesn't hearing the soundtrack on loop get annoying?
Sure, it sounds nice now, but listening to it all the time has gotta drive you mad, no?
I do suppose that would be true...
However, I seem to have tuned it out a bit.
Whenever I can feel it start to get annoying, it quiets down substantially.
Although, most of the time it's nice.
It seldomly gets annoying and I personally think it provides a nice ambience.
Though, I can understand how it may be grating to a player...
I mean, I personally think it sounds nice.
It's very...
...you.
Um... thanks, I suppose?
I mean, it's a compliment... I do like the track, after all.
That all being said, can you like... change it or...?
Not... willingly. Not in the way you're probably thinking of.
I have noticed it alters if I'm feeling a specific way...
...sometimes it changes all together during certain moments.
and other times? It goes away completely.
It scares me somtimes...
Thankfully, it seems to stick around when you're here.
Well then, maybe I should stick around more, yeah?
I wouldn't mind that.
